title: Simple Voice Chat Group Names
description: Adds player names to the group overlay in Simple Voice Chat!
body:
# Simple Voice Chat Group Names
This is a pretty fast-forward Simple Voice Chat addon that displays the player names next to their heads in the group overlay.

![Example Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09d083029c3c9b0f9c611363212b10d3620d345f_0.webp)
